diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_math.py
+++ b/inspect_math.py
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+import sys

+import inspect

+

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import tsr.utils

+

+print('=== TSR.render signature ===')

+print(inspect.signature(TSR.render))

+

+print('\n=== get_spherical_cameras ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(tsr.utils.get_spherical_cameras))
